title: Release evidence package and final hygiene
goal: Package the G003 Docker-backed staging evidence for commit readiness without rerunning S011-S021 or claiming real provider/production signoff.
scope: Audit S011-S021 board results, verification files, todo status, and Docker staging summary.
Run final hygiene checks for JSON parse, git diff whitespace, focused API tests, and API type-check.
Create a release evidence index that points to S019, S020, and S021 key evidence paths and records remaining external signoff.
